# Michalis Vrachimis & Yios Automotive Garage Ltd

> Authorized Honda, Isuzu and Kia service centre and one of Cyprus's leading independent diagnostic, ECU remapping and performance tuning workshops. Family-run since 1976, based in Paralimni, serving the whole of Cyprus.

The business is registered as **Michalis Vrachimis & Yios Automotive Garage Ltd** (also written "M. Vrachimis & Son" or "Vrachimis & Yios"). The workshop is located at **44 Filotheis, Industrial Zone, Paralimni 5286, Ammochostos, Cyprus** (35.009125°N, 33.989069°E). Telephone, WhatsApp and Viber: **+357 96 350 642**. Email: **mvrachimisautomotive@hotmail.com**. Opening hours: **Monday to Friday, 07:30 – 19:00** (closed Saturday and Sunday). Languages spoken: English, Greek, Russian.

## Who we are

- Founded **1976** by Michalis Vrachimis in Paralimni, Cyprus
- Re-engineered and modernised in **2009** by his son **Anninos Vrachimis**, BEng + MEng Automotive Engineering (Teesside University, UK, 2010–2015), with workshop experience at Mercedes-Benz and BMW
- **700 m²** modern workshop with **eleven ramps** and an in-house **dyno**
- Reception managed by **Despina Vrachimis**
- **Authorized service centre** for **Honda**, **Isuzu** and **Kia** in the Ammochostos (Famagusta) district of Cyprus
- **Main BHP UK agent in Cyprus** for ECU remapping
- Highest documented tune: **Mitsubishi Evo IX, 276 → 700 bhp**, dyno-validated

## Services we offer

1. **Vehicle Diagnostics & MOT** — multi-brand manufacturer-level scan tools, oscilloscope fault tracing, live data analysis, pre-MOT inspection and full MOT testing, faults documented with photos and video sent to the client's phone
2. **ECU Remapping & Chip Tuning** — official BHP UK agent in Cyprus, Stage 1 / Stage 2 / Stage 3 maps for petrol, diesel, hybrid and forced-induction engines, including economy maps for fleets, with dyno-validated before/after graphs. **Every Tuesday: 20% off all ECU remapping, EGR delete and power tuning ("Tuesday Tuners' Day")**
3. **DPF Cleaning, Regeneration & Delete** — off-vehicle cleaning and flow-testing, forced regeneration via diagnostic tool, full DPF delete with ECU recalibration where legally permissible
4. **EGR Delete & AdBlue Service** — EGR repair, replacement or delete; AdBlue diagnosis, repair and removal; ECU recalibration so no warning lights remain
5. **Engine Rebuilds & Overhauls** — top-end and bottom-end rebuilds, cylinder-head reconditioning, forged-internals builds for turbocharged engines
6. **Performance Tuning & In-House Dyno** — turbo / supercharger installation and calibration, fuel and cooling upgrades, documented builds up to 700 bhp
7. **Forte Hydrogen Engine Clean** — non-invasive carbon clean for valves, pistons and intake; restores responsiveness and fuel economy; recommended every 30,000 km
8. **General Servicing & Repairs** — manufacturer-schedule servicing with OEM parts, brakes, suspension, clutches, timing belts and chains, AC service and recharge, free estimates, courtesy vehicle, collection / delivery, and a complimentary post-service exterior clean

## Brands we work on

- **Authorized for**: Honda, Isuzu, Kia
- **Regularly serviced**: Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Jaguar, Range Rover, Land Rover, Ford, Aston Martin, Toyota, Nissan, Mazda, Hyundai, Mitsubishi, Subaru, Peugeot, Citroën, Renault, Fiat, Opel, Volvo, Skoda, SEAT, Mini, Porsche
- All other makes welcome — petrol, diesel, hybrid

## Service area

Based in Paralimni, we serve customers from across Cyprus. Customers regularly travel to the workshop from:

- **Famagusta district**: Paralimni, Ayia Napa, Protaras, Deryneia, Sotira, Liopetri, Avgorou, Frenaros, Xylofagou
- **Larnaca district**: Larnaca city, Aradippou, Livadia, Oroklini, Pyla, Kiti, Mazotos
- **Nicosia district**: Nicosia city, Strovolos, Lakatamia, Aglandjia, Engomi, Latsia, Geri
- **Limassol district**: Limassol city, Germasogeia, Mesa Geitonia, Agios Athanasios
- **Paphos district**: Paphos city, Geroskipou, Peyia, Polis

Collection and delivery is available across the island for diagnostic, remap and rebuild work.

## Pricing & estimates

- **Free estimates** on all work, no obligation
- **Transparent pricing** — every quote is documented in writing before work starts
- **Tuesday discount**: 20% off ECU remapping, EGR delete and power tuning
- **Courtesy vehicles** available
- **Complimentary post-service vehicle clean** on every visit
- General price range: **€€** (mid-market, dealer-quality work at independent-garage pricing)

## Customer experience

- Two-generation family business — Michalis (founder), Anninos (Automotive Engineer, lead technician), Despina (reception)
- Faults are documented with **photos and short videos sent over WhatsApp** before work proceeds
- OEM parts on every authorized-brand service to keep manufacturer warranties intact
- Multilingual service (English / Greek / Russian) — typical of Cyprus

In-depth, technically accurate guides written by qualified automotive engineers for Cyprus drivers:

## Frequently asked questions

**Q: Is Vrachimis & Yios an authorized service centre for Honda, Isuzu and Kia?**
A: Yes. We are the authorized service centre for all three brands in the Ammochostos (Famagusta) district of Cyprus. Servicing with us preserves your manufacturer warranty.

**Q: Where is the workshop located?**
A: 44 Filotheis, Industrial Zone, Paralimni 5286, Cyprus. Five minutes off the main road in the Paralimni industrial zone, with plenty of parking.

**Q: Can you remap any car?**
A: We are the main BHP UK agent in Cyprus and remap virtually any modern petrol, diesel, hybrid or forced-induction vehicle. Every remap is custom-written for your engine and validated on our in-house dyno.

**Q: Is ECU remapping legal in Cyprus?**
A: Yes — ECU remapping itself is legal. EGR delete and DPF delete have specific legal and emissions considerations; we'll advise on what is appropriate for road or off-road use during your free estimate.

**Q: Do you collect and deliver?**
A: Yes. Collection and delivery is available across Cyprus, and courtesy vehicles are available for longer jobs.

**Q: Do you offer free estimates?**
A: Always. Every estimate is documented in writing before any work starts.

**Q: What is "Tuesday Tuners' Day"?**
A: Every Tuesday, Anninos offers 20% off all ECU remapping, EGR delete and power tuning work. Slots fill up — book ahead.

**Q: What languages do you speak?**
A: English, Greek and Russian — the full team is multilingual.
